requirement_topic.en: Lithium Battery Transport — UN 38.3 and Dangerous Goods File
requirement_topic.zh: 锂电池运输——UN 38.3及危险货物文件
requirement_topic.zht: 鋰電池運輸——UN 38.3及危險貨物文件

summary.en: Lithium cells, modules, racks, and replacement batteries shipped to Oman should have UN Manual of Tests and Criteria, Part III, subsection 38.3 evidence where dangerous-goods transport rules require it. Exporters should prepare the UN 38.3 test summary, SDS, dangerous-goods classification, packaging evidence, state-of-charge controls, and sea or air shipping documents.
summary.zh: 运往阿曼的锂电芯、模组、电池架和替换电池在危险货物运输规则要求时，应具备《联合国试验和标准手册》第三部分38.3小节证据。出口商应准备UN 38.3测试概要、SDS、危险货物分类、包装证据、荷电状态控制以及海运或空运文件。
summary.zht: 運往阿曼的鋰電芯、模組、電池架和替換電池在危險貨物運輸規則要求時，應具備《聯合國試驗和標準手冊》第三部分38.3小節證據。出口商應準備UN 38.3測試概要、SDS、危險貨物分類、包裝證據、荷電狀態控制以及海運或空運文件。

standards_or_laws: UN Manual of Tests and Criteria, Part III, subsection 38.3
ICAO Technical Instructions / IATA DGR for air transport

summary.en: China exporters commonly prepare UN 38.3 reports, MSDS/SDS, transport condition appraisal documents, and dangerous-goods packaging documents. These documents remain necessary but must match the exact Oman shipment configuration and route.
summary.zh: 中国出口商通常准备UN 38.3报告、MSDS/SDS、运输条件鉴定文件和危险货物包装文件。这些文件仍然必要，但必须与实际运往阿曼的货物配置和运输路线一致。
summary.zht: 中國出口商通常準備UN 38.3報告、MSDS/SDS、運輸條件鑑定文件和危險貨物包裝文件。這些文件仍然必要，但必須與實際運往阿曼的貨物配置和運輸路線一致。

standards_or_laws: UN 38.3 test report and test summary

gap.en: Transport evidence is configuration-specific. A UN 38.3 report for a cell may not cover a module, rack, containerized BESS, replacement battery, altered state of charge, or mixed shipment. Oman importers, carriers, ports, or airlines may reject inconsistent test summaries, SDS classifications, package marks, or shipping names.
gap.zh: 运输证据与配置强相关。电芯UN 38.3报告未必覆盖模组、电池架、集装箱式BESS、替换电池、改变荷电状态或混装货物。阿曼进口商、承运人、港口或航空公司可能拒收测试概要、SDS分类、包装标识或运输品名不一致的货物。
gap.zht: 運輸證據與配置強相關。電芯UN 38.3報告未必覆蓋模組、電池架、集裝箱式BESS、替換電池、改變荷電狀態或混裝貨物。阿曼進口商、承運人、港口或航空公司可能拒收測試概要、SDS分類、包裝標識或運輸品名不一致的貨物。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for lithium battery transport where dangerous-goods transport rules apply
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for export transport where dangerous-goods transport rules apply

source.publisher: United Nations Economic Commission for Europe (UNECE)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] IEC or Chinese GB battery safety evidence does not replace UN 38.3 transport evidence. The shipped configuration to Oman must be covered by the UN 38.3 test summary and dangerous-goods documents.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] IEC或中国GB电池安全证据不能替代UN 38.3运输证据。实际运往阿曼的配置必须被UN 38.3测试概要和危险货物文件覆盖。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] IEC或中國GB電池安全證據不能替代UN 38.3運輸證據。實際運往阿曼的配置必須被UN 38.3測試概要和危險貨物文件覆蓋。
